headline: CF Industries Holdings (CF) Is Up 11.9% After Fertilizer Tightness Highlights Low-Cost Gas Advantage
summary: In recent weeks, CF Industries Holdings has benefited from Middle East supply disruptions that tightened global nitrogen markets, lifted fertilizer prices and highlighted its access to relatively low-cost US natural gas. At the same time, the company has drawn political and regulatory attention over sharp urea price increases and ongoing Department of Justice scrutiny of fertilizer pricing practices. CF Industries is also accelerating its push into low-carbon ammonia and clean-energy...

headline: CF Industries: It's Still Underpriced Despite The Rally
summary: CF Industries maintains a significant competitive advantage over European and Asian peers who are currently struggling. Read why CF stock is a buy.

headline: QVAL: Value ETF Lagging Its Peers
summary: QVAL demonstrates a rare blend of value and growth, with a focus on mid-caps, consumer discretionary, and industrials. Read my analysis of the QVAL ETF here.
